autodetection_retry.title: Detection retry
autodetection_retry.description: Recheck interval in seconds. Zero disables retries.

discovery_every.title: Discovery every
discovery_every.description: Resource discovery refresh interval, in seconds.

query_offset.title: Query offset
query_offset.description: How many seconds to shift queries into the past to avoid partial Azure Monitor windows.

timeout.title: Timeout
timeout.description: Timeout for Azure Resource Graph and Azure Monitor API requests, in seconds.

max_concurrency.title: Max concurrency
max_concurrency.description: Maximum concurrent Azure Monitor batch requests.

max_batch_resources.title: Max resources per batch
max_batch_resources.description: Maximum resource IDs per batch API call.

max_metrics_per_query.title: Max metrics per query
max_metrics_per_query.description: Maximum metric names per batch API call.

resource_groups.title: Resource groups
resource_groups.description: Optional list of Azure resource groups to include.

profiles.title: Profiles
profiles.description: Profile ids to enable. Use 'auto' for automatic discovery based on resource types in the subscription. Combine with explicit ids: ['auto', 'custom_profile']. Empty list disables collection.

mode_service_principal.title: Service Principal
mode_service_principal.description: Service principal settings used when mode is `service_principal`.

mode_managed_identity.title: Managed Identity
mode_managed_identity.description: Managed identity settings used when mode is `managed_identity`.

client_id.title: Client ID
client_id.description: Optional client ID of a user-assigned managed identity.

vnode.title: Virtual Node
vnode.description: Associates this data collection job with a Virtual Node.

timeout.ui:help: Accepts decimals for sub-second granularity (for example, `0.5` for 500ms).

mode.ui:help:
Choose how Netdata gets Azure credentials.

- `service_principal`: Use an Azure app / service principal. Requires `tenant_id`, `client_id`, and `client_secret` in `mode_service_principal`.
- `managed_identity`: Use the managed identity attached to the Azure resource running Netdata. Set `mode_managed_identity.client_id` only for a user-assigned identity.
- `default`: Use the Azure SDK `DefaultAzureCredential` chain. This automatically tries available Azure credential sources, such as environment-based credentials, managed identity, and local developer credentials.

Use `service_principal` for explicit app credentials. Use `managed_identity` when Netdata runs on an Azure resource with an attached identity. Use `default` when you want Azure SDK auto-discovery or local development convenience.
